name: Optimal Performance Golf
about: Optimal Performance Golf (OPG) is an indoor golf and sports bar facility in Maple Grove, Minnesota, offering a year-round golf experience. It features golf simulators, club fitting services, leagues, clinics, and a full-service bar and restaurant called Paulie's. The venue is designed to provide a best-in-class experience with a focus on community and technology, utilizing advanced fitting technology like the Foresight GC Quad Max and dual camera simulators.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Foresight GC Quad Max technology for precise club fitting
Year-round access to golf regardless of weather conditions
Full-service bar and restaurant (Paulie's) for a complete experience
Specialized leagues and camps for all skill levels and ages
Dedicated indoor putting and chipping greens

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant (Paulie's) with a menu available online

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with 4-camera function for precise fitting data
Dual camera and pressure plate technology for teaching and play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs, but club rentals are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The facility has a full-service bar and restaurant, Paulie's, on-site.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round on the simulator takes approximately one hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Optimal Performance Golf is family-friendly and welcomes children, with junior camps and clinics available.
